items.title: This will be the first conference finals Game 7 since 2023 Heat at Boston, and the first WCF Game 7 since 2018 Warriors at Houston.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
This will be the first conference finals Game 7 since 2023 Heat at Boston, and the first WCF Game 7 since 2018 Warriors at Houston.

The road team has won the last four conference finals Game 7s.

Oklahoma City Thunder have now lost all three Game 6s under Mark Daigneault.

items.title: Multi-year highs continue for NBA conference finals:
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Multi-year highs continue for NBA conference finals:
-- Spurs-Thunder most-watched conference final through four games since Heat-Bulls in '11
-- Knicks-Cavs sweep most-watched ECF since seven-game Heat-Celtics in '23

Usual methodological caveats apply. www.sportsmediawatch.com/2026/05/nba-...

items.title: A defendant in the federal NBA gambling case told a judge today he paid an NBA player to change his performance so he could bet on him. The player, a federal prosecutor said, was former Charlotte Hornets and Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
A defendant in the federal NBA gambling case told a judge today he paid an NBA player to change his performance so he could bet on him. The player, a federal prosecutor said, was former Charlotte Hornets and Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier. 

Free to read👇 www.nytimes.com/athletic/731...

media.title: Marves Fairley claims he paid Terry Rozier as part of illegal gambling scheme (Gift Article)
media.description: Fairley pleaded guilty Thursday to seven felony counts against two separate cases brought by the Department of Justice over the last year.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.

items.title: Over the last seven seasons (since The Bubble), the three teams that have exceeded their 3pt Shot Quality in the playoffs the most by eFG%:
items.author: Couper Moorhead
items.body_excerpt:
Over the last seven seasons (since The Bubble), the three teams that have exceeded their 3pt Shot Quality in the playoffs the most by eFG%:

1. Knicks (25-26) at +7.69%
2. Heat (22-23) at +5.23%
3. Pacers (24-25) at +4.93%

(Min 500 3pt FGA)

2026: Knicks (lost in '25 ECF)
2025: Pacers (lost in '24 ECF)
2024: Celtics (lost in '23 ECF)
2023: Heat (lost in '22 ECF)

(via UnderdogNBA)
#NBA

items.title: Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).

This is only the second time since *2014* that the WCF has been tied 2-2.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Rasaul Butler. LaSalle SF was drafted 53rd in 2002 by MIA. Made the team as a shooter who played some defense. Scored 7 ppg before trade to NO in 2005.  Started from 2008-10 & peaked at 12 ppg. Bounced around from 2011-16 before retiring. Sadly died in 2018. RIP.

items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Chicago Bulls will interview Miami Heat assistant coach Chris Quinn as part of their head coaching search, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Quinn has a strong background in player development and has worked as an assistant coach on Erik Spoelstra’s staff since 2014.
